THE MATERNAL GRANDMOTHER WILL SUPERVISE OVERNIGHT VISITATION. PETITIONER WILL AUTHORIZE THE CHILD'S THERAPIST TO TALK TO RESPONDENT. PARTIES WILL
OTHER WEEKEND FROM AFTER SCHOOL ON THURSDAY UNTIL SUNDAY. ON ALTERNATE WEDNESDAYS THE MOTHER WILL VISIT FOR TWO HOURS WITH THE CHILD. THIS VISIT MAY
0 P.M. WITH THE MOTHER PROVIDING THE TRANSPORTATION. PARTIES SHALL HAVE OBTAINED AN APPOINTMENT FOR CO-PARENT COUNSELING BY JANUARY 13, 1999. THIS
